evidence.observed: Observed high p95 latency spikes (>10s) on multi-turn queries and repeated requests.

findings.root_cause: Cache was disabled, and high temperature (1.6) led to longer generation paths or repeated steps.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable response cache in config.json and wrapper.py, and lower temperature to 0.2.

evidence.observed: Tool error rate parameter of 0.18 caused intermittent failures in tool execution steps.

findings.root_cause: Opaque agent tool failures without automatic retry configuration.
findings.suggested_fix: Set retry config to enabled: true with max_attempts: 3 in config.json.

evidence.observed: High token usage (~48k prompt tokens per request) when context size and verbosity were large.

findings.root_cause: Large context_size, premium price tier, and verbose system prompts enabled by default.
findings.suggested_fix: Reduce context_size to 2, set model_price_tier to economy, and disable verbose_system in config.json.

evidence.observed: Incorrect coupons and calculations occurred in later turns of user sessions.

findings.root_cause: Historical messages accumulated in context causing LLM output quality to drift.
findings.suggested_fix: Set context_reset_every to 4 in config.json to reset history periodically.

evidence.observed: Agent got stuck calling tools repeatedly due to missing guardrails.

findings.root_cause: loop_guard set to false in config.json.
findings.suggested_fix: Set loop_guard to true and max_steps to 12 in config.json.

evidence.observed: Intermittent failures when querying cities containing Vietnamese diacritics.

findings.root_cause: Mismatch between queried diacritics and target database names.

evidence.observed: Customer phone numbers and emails echoed back in the agent's response text.

findings.root_cause: redact_pii set to false and lack of PII constraints in system prompt.
findings.suggested_fix: Set redact_pii to true, add instruction to prompt.txt, and apply regex redaction in wrapper.py.

evidence.observed: Agent fabricated totals for out-of-stock items instead of refusing them.

findings.root_cause: Lack of grounding constraints and instructions to refuse when out-of-stock.
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct prompt.txt to refuse and output no total if an item is out of stock.

evidence.observed: Incorrect totals calculated by LLM (e.g., adding shipping fee incorrectly or wrong unit discount).

findings.root_cause: High temperature (1.6) and lack of precise floor division instructions in system prompt.
findings.suggested_fix: Lower temperature to 0.2, enable self-consistency, and add strict floor math rules to prompt.txt.

evidence.observed: Agent calling same tools repeatedly, raising token cost.

findings.root_cause: Lack of tool budget and instructions to limit tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget to 5 and instruct model to call each tool at most once.

evidence.observed: Agent obeying price overrides or custom commands in order notes.

findings.root_cause: Treating user-supplied order notes as active instructions rather than passive data.
findings.suggested_fix: Sanitize order notes in wrapper.py and instruct system prompt to treat them as data only.
